task_domain.name: release_ops
task_domain.label: Release / Ops
task_domain.reason: Workflow metadata matches release or operational automation.

agentic_assessments.summary: This Release / Ops run consumed a heavy execution profile for its task shape.
agentic_assessments.recommendation: Compare this run to similar successful runs and trim unnecessary turns, tools, or write actions.

agentic_assessments.summary: The run showed signs of broad or weakly controlled agentic behavior.
agentic_assessments.recommendation: Tighten instructions, reduce unnecessary tools, or delay write actions until the workflow has stronger evidence.

agentic_assessments.summary: About 81% of this run's turns appear to be data-gathering that could move to deterministic steps.
agentic_assessments.recommendation: Move data-fetching work to frontmatter steps: (pre-agent) writing to /tmp/gh-aw/agent/ or post-steps: (post-agent) to reduce inference cost. See the Deterministic & Agentic Patterns guide.

missing_tools.reason: Tool cannot push to branches with '@' characters (e.g., sdkauto/`@azure-arm-servicefabric-6101245`). The merge commit was prepared locally but cannot be pushed automatically.
missing_tools.alternatives: The PR author or maintainer should manually merge main into the PR branch and regenerate pnpm-lock.yaml following the conflict guide.
